description_long: This is a vintage-style biplane with a green fuselage and dual sets of straight, parallel wings supported by brown struts and wires. The front features a prominent wooden propeller and a metallic grill, with two main landing wheels beneath the lower wing. The tail section is equipped with a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in matching green. The cockpit is positioned just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield and an open seating area. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century aircraft, with exposed structural elements and a compact, robust build.
description: A green vintage biplane with dual wings, wooden propeller, and open cockpit, featuring exposed struts and classic landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the dual green wings, tail assembly, and the full length of the fuselage.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the propeller, landing gear, cockpit, and the layered wing structure.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the wooden propeller, grill, and symmetrical wing arrangement with visible struts.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the propeller, landing gear, and cockpit from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts and wires; no winglets or noticeable dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a small tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the upper wing, likely single-seat with a small windshield.
